Common.description: Almstkshf is a UAE-based firm specialized in building intelligent solutions for executive-level institutions. We deliver advanced platforms for media monitoring and public sentiment analysis, along with custom-built ERP/CRM/BI systems tailored to critical sectors such as government, legal, security, and public services. We don’t build disconnected tools. We develop integrated ecosystems that generate clarity, connect insight to execution, and empower leadership to act with precision and confidence.

Footer.description: Innovative AI-driven solutions for media monitoring, legal intelligence, and strategic decision making.
Footer.address_dubai: Dubai: One Central 9th Floor - Trade Center
Footer.address_abu_dhabi: Abu Dhabi: Al Khatem Tower - Al Maryah Island

faq.title: Expert Insights
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the LEXCORA legal ecosystem.

what_is.a: LEXCORA is a specialized ERP application built exclusively for law firms. It consolidates client files, court sessions, legal deadlines, client/opponent databases, accounting, and HR into one unified bilingual system.

deadlines.a: LEXCORA uses automated tracking tied to case phases. Critical dates like appeals are generated on a clear timeline with smart alerts to ensure no court date is ever missed.

database.a: It provides a unified record for every entity (client, opponent, or prospect), linking them to relevant cases, meetings, and relationship history for a 360-degree overview.

customization.a: Yes. LEXCORA is fully bilingual (Arabic/English) and offers 10 different themes for fonts and colors to align perfectly with your firm's visual identity.

financials.a: It features a specialized legal accounting tree and HR modules for team data management, task assignments, and resource utilization tracking.

permissions.a: It uses a fine-grained Role-Based Access System. You can control view/edit rights for every module using templates like Managing Partner, Lawyer, or Accountant.

lexcora.cta_join: Join the elite circle of law firms powered by LEXCORA governance and intelligence.

styling.intro: Virtual-Stylist is an AI-powered style companion designed to curate the perfect look tailored to your unique body shape and the specific vibe of any occasion.
styling.desc1: Our proprietary AI doesn't just suggest clothes—it understands your aesthetic. By analyzing global fashion trends and learning from your personal preferences, Virtual-Stylist crafts complete outfits, right down to the accessories.
styling.desc2: Ready to shop the look? We’ll bridge the gap between digital inspiration and reality by pinpointing the nearest boutiques carrying your favorite pieces.

Team.subtitle: Meet the visionaries leading the Almstkshf intelligence ecosystem.

tamer.name: Tamer Younes
tamer.desc: Tamer Gad is a seasoned PR and marketing consultant with over 20 years of experience in the GCC. He holds a Bachelor’s in Media, a Master’s in Social Marketing, a Diploma in Operations Management, and a Certificate in Prompt Engineering for Artificial Intelligence. Licensed by twofour54, he advises on AI-powered media monitoring, sentiment analysis, and strategic communication for public and private entities in the UAE.

rami.name: Eng. Rami Kamel
rami.desc: Eng. Rami Kamel is a cybersecurity engineer and co-founder of the AlMstkshf media intelligence platform. With a strong background in secure systems design and AI integration, he leads the technical architecture behind real-time sentiment analysis and multi-source media monitoring. Rami is known for his ability to merge data security with smart decision-support tools, enabling government and enterprise clients across the UAE to act on media insights with confidence.

Team.quote: At Almstkshf, we are not just analysts; we are architects of clarity in an era of information overload.

WhoWeAre.title: Who We Are & What We Do
WhoWeAre.intro: We offer solutions that are second to none. Our customers are professionals in their field: marketing, PR, politics, analytics and many more. As such, they rely on nothing but the world’s best and most flexible solutions available. ALMSTKSHF combines the most innovative technologies with the most extensive broadcast channel coverage, high quality service and the highest levels of security. This way, media monitoring can contribute to its users achieving outstanding performance.

tech_driven.title: We are tech-driven
tech_driven.desc: Technology is the engine that drives us and that makes our system so unique. In-house developed solutions based on speech-to-text and deep learning enable us to react flexibly to the needs of our customers - quickly and easily. By adding innovative technologies such as fingerprint we are able to offer a technically sophisticated range of advanced yet user-friendly products.

integration.desc: The Almstkshf AI Agent doesn't just talk — it acts. It connects with your monitoring data to provide insights that are contextually accurate and tactically sound.

custom_profiles.title: Custom Search Profiles

You can view your latest clips in real time, analyzing, and editing them with ease. Whenever clips matching your search terms are broadcast, you receive immediate alerts, empowering you to act quickly. The MEDIA PULSE system is among the best media monitoring tools for staying ahead in the rapid media landscape

use_cases.title: Use Case Scenarios
use_cases.intro: To illustrate how different users derive value from ALMSTKSHF, here are a few realistic use case scenarios:

case1.title: Use Case 1: Brand Reputation Crisis Management
case1.scenario: A PR manager at a large company uses ALMSTKSHF to monitor mentions of their brand and products. One morning, the platform’s alert system notifies her (via WhatsApp and email) that there’s a sudden surge in negative sentiment related to a new product launch. She logs into the dashboard and sees a spike in mentions and a flurry of negative tweets citing a product malfunction. Using ALMSTKSHF, she drills down into the social listening insights: the sentiment analysis confirms a high negativity score, and theme extraction shows the word “fire hazard” trending. She activates a crisis case workspace and invites product team members and customer support to collaborate. Together, they review the top mentions and identify an originating post (a video of the product catching fire) that went viral. The PR manager quickly uses the Media Publisher to draft an official statement and schedule it across social media and to press contacts. As responses come in, the team tracks media coverage of the incident via the monitoring module. The platform’s real-time updates show when sentiment starts to recover after their statement. Later, they generate a crisis report covering the timeline of the event, key influencers who drove the story, and how the crisis was resolved.

case2.title: Use Case 2: Criminal Network Investigation
case2.scenario: An intelligence analyst is investigating an online extremist group. He creates a new Case in ALMSTKSHF for “Operation Eastern Falcon” and lists a set of keywords to monitor across social media, forums, and the dark web. The platform immediately begins pulling historical data and sets up continuous monitoring. The analyst uses the link analysis graph visualization to map connections between profiles talking about the group. He discovers through the platform’s analysis that several seemingly unrelated individuals are actually connected via mutual followers and shared content – revealing a potential cell. One particular Twitter account stands out as highly influential in spreading the group’s propaganda. The analyst uses the data enrichment tools to extract more info on that account: Social Links integration helps find associated profiles on other platforms and even uncovers an email address reuse via a breach database. The analyst also takes advantage of the TOR integration to anonymously browse a dark web forum where the group’s members congregate. Once enough intelligence is gathered, the analyst compiles a case report with all key findings using the platform’s reporting engine.

case3.title: Use Case 3: Media Outreach and Coverage Tracking
case3.scenario: A communications director at a tech firm is planning a major product announcement. Using ALMSTKSHF’s Media Publisher, she drafts a press release complete with embedded images and video links. She selects a list of 50 journalists in the tech industry and schedules the press release to be sent at 9 AM next day. The release goes out automatically; using the Track News feature, she checks which journalists opened the email and downloaded the media kit. Throughout the day, she monitors the platform as news articles begin to appear. ALMSTKSHF’s media monitoring catches each mention of the product in online news and blogs. By evening, she generates an Analytics Report showing the day’s media coverage: number of articles published, estimated readership, overall sentiment of the coverage, and social media buzz. She shares a summarized dashboard with the executive team via a secure link. A week later, she also receives the platform’s automated Weekly Round-up Report that highlights the main media narratives for that week – her product launch is at the top, confirming the success of their campaign.

case4.title: Use Case 4: Social Media Content Strategy
case4.scenario: A social media manager for a retail brand is planning next month’s content. Inside ALMSTKSHF, she uses the Post Scheduler to lay out a content calendar for multiple platforms. With the help of AI suggestions, she identifies the best times to post each day and even gets hashtag suggestions that are currently trending in her niche. She drafts posts for the first week, including images from last month’s photoshoot which she quickly found in the Media Center by searching the tag “summer collection”. She invites her team into the platform – they comment and tweak the copy right there, ensuring all feedback is consolidated. Once finalized, she schedules the posts. As they go live, ALMSTKSHF pulls in the engagement metrics. Halfway through the month, the manager reviews the Social Performance Dashboard: one particular post underperformed. Using the platform’s listening module, she checks if there was any negative conversation around it. She decides to swap out a planned post for a response addressing that feedback. By the end of the month, she uses ALMSTKSHF to generate a Monthly Engagement Report that informs next month’s strategy.

use_cases.conclusion: Each scenario above demonstrates how ALMSTKSHF supports fast, informed decision-making: catching issues early, digging deep into data, and coordinating responses – whether it’s mitigating a crisis, uncovering hidden links in an investigation, amplifying a product launch, or refining social strategy.

press.title: Press Publication Monitoring
press.description: ALMSTKSHF provides comprehensive monitoring of newspapers, magazines, and digital news portals. Stay informed about every mention of your brand in the press, track distribution, and measure the impact of your PR campaigns.

digital_print.title: Digital & Print Coverage
digital_print.desc: Access a vast database of global and local press sources, including major newspapers and niche publications.

publisher.title: Media Publisher
publisher.desc: Distribute your press releases to a curated list of journalists and track pickup in real-time.

analytics.title: ROI Analytics
analytics.desc: Calculate Advertising Value Equivalency (AVE) and other key metrics to demonstrate the value of your media coverage.

alerts.title: Automated Alerts
alerts.desc: Get notified the moment your brand is mentioned or when a potential PR crisis is detected.

press.console_desc: Access your latest reports and crisis management plans below.
press.everything_in_one: "Everything in one place: monitoring, social listening, and distribution."

use_cases.title: Meet our Users
use_cases.intro: Discover how professionals use Almstkshf to streamline their press monitoring and distribution workflows.

noor.title: Noor – PR/Communications Manager
noor.scenario:
Noor is responsible for her company’s public image and press relations. She values timely alerts on emerging news about her company, an easy way to distribute press releases, and simple reports she can share with executives.

How AlMstkshf helps: Noor uses Media Monitoring to keep track of brand mentions and competitor news. The Alerts notify her of any potential PR crises. She uses the Media Publisher to maintain a journalist contacts list and schedule press releases at optimal times. Post-campaign, she leverages one-click analytics reports (with metrics like advertising value equivalent of media coverage) to show ROI.

The intuitive dashboards and the fact that everything is in one place (media monitoring, social listening, and distribution) make it easy for Noor to manage her workflow without juggling multiple tools. Daily, weekly, monthly reports about your press release.

central_media_repository.title: Central Media Repository
central_media_repository.description: AlMstkshf includes a Media Center which serves as a central repository for all digital assets – images, videos, audio files, documents – relevant to media and investigations. All files are stored securely and organized in a hierarchical folder structure with a clean, searchable interface.
central_media_repository.intro: The repository is organization-wide, preventing scattered content in emails or personal drives. Users no longer need to worry about lost or mismanaged files, as everything is in one place.

smart_search.title: Smart Search & Tags
smart_search.desc: Every file in the Media Center can be tagged and has metadata (e.g. title, description, date, source). The system uses smart tagging to make assets easily searchable. For example, if a photo is uploaded, the system might automatically tag it with detected keywords using image recognition.

bulk_upload.title: Bulk Upload & Ingestion
bulk_upload.desc: The Media Center supports bulk uploading of files. Whether importing an archive of thousands of images or ingesting daily batches of news clips, users can drag-and-drop large sets of files. The system will process them in the background, extracting text via OCR and generating metadata.

facial_recognition.title: AI-Powered Facial Recognition
facial_recognition.desc: A standout feature is integrated facial recognition on images. When photos are added, the AI scans for human faces, cross-references with databases, and tags the person's name. You can even subscribe to face tags for real-time alerts.

labeling_rating.title: Asset Labeling & Rating
labeling_rating.desc: Apply custom labels or ratings for organizational purposes. mark images as 'Approved' or rate them for quality. Labels help in workflow (e.g. 'Needs editing') and in strategic filtering.

sharing_access.title: Secure Sharing & Access
sharing_access.desc: Simple sharing of files or collections with secure links. External sharing can be password-protected. Manage permissions within teams to ensure a single source of truth and eliminate version confusion.

versioning_audit.title: Versioning & Audit Log
versioning_audit.desc: Keep track of asset versions and maintain a full audit log of who accessed or downloaded files. Essential for security and ensuring sensitive material is handled correctly.

secure_storage.title: Enterprise Storage
secure_storage.desc: Server-side storage with full backups and redundancy. Designed to replace ad-hoc solutions like USB drives, mitigating security threats and accidental data loss.

enterprise_hub.title: One Unified Hub for All Your Digital Assets
enterprise_hub.description: The repository is organization-wide, preventing scattered content in emails or personal drives. Users no longer need to worry about lost or mismanaged files, as everything is in one place.

advanced_capabilities.title: Advanced Capabilities
advanced_capabilities.subtitle: Every tool you need to manage, search, and secure your media intelligence.

cta.title: Ready to centralize your media intelligence?
cta.subtitle: Join elite government and media organizations using AlMstkshf to secure their digital history.

intro.title: Intelligent Media Insights
intro.description: Media Pulse is a leading media monitoring and insights platform that delivers real-time intelligence across all media channels. It continuously tracks print, online, and broadcast media outputs, aggregating any content that mentions your brand, products, or topics of interest. Our platform uses advanced analytics and AI-powered sentiment analysis to surface trends and opportunities from this data. Clients benefit from instant alerts and comprehensive dashboards that highlight key metrics (mentions, share of voice, sentiment, reach) in one unified interface. By transforming disparate media data into clear insights, ALMSTKSHF empowers decision-makers to protect their brand reputation and make proactive, data-driven decisions.

omni_channel.title: Omni-Channel Coverage
omni_channel.description: Tracks news sites, blogs, social media, TV, and radio for any mention of your brand or industry.

ai_analytics.title: AI-Driven Analytics
ai_analytics.description: Uses machine learning to identify topics, perform sentiment analysis, and flag emerging issues. Our tools monitor and analyze online conversations about your brand, including hashtags, keywords and competitor mentions.

alerts.title: Real-Time Alerts & Reports
alerts.description: Sends targeted email/SMS alerts the moment relevant coverage appears. Customizable newsletters and daily briefs filter priority stories so you can stay focused on results that matter, with personalized charts to highlight your media impact.

dashboards.title: Executive Dashboards
dashboards.description: Provides leadership-ready reports and summaries. Each morning, key executives can open their inbox to a curated briefing with the most influential coverage from social, broadcast, print, and online. Detailed, executive-ready custom reports packed with critical media insights help you leverage this data for strategic decisions.

MediaPulseDetail.conclusion: Through this comprehensive, technology-driven approach, ALMSTKSHF offers a clear, concise value proposition: we turn nonstop media noise into timely insight, helping businesses stay ahead of the conversation and maintain a strong public image.

monitoring.title: Media Monitoring
monitoring.description: Our Media Monitoring service delivers comprehensive tracking of traditional and digital media. We systematically scan newspapers, TV and radio broadcasts, websites, blogs, and forums to capture any mention of your organization or topics of interest. This automated monitoring is based on industry best practices – including the systematic recording of broadcasts, social media, and web, alongside the collection of press clippings from print media. The collected content is indexed into searchable archives and presented in intuitive dashboards. Users can query mentions by keyword, entity or source, and apply filters for region or media type. Our dashboards display key metrics (number of mentions, share of voice, estimated reach, sentiment) over time, giving PR and comms teams a clear view of coverage and impact.

listening.title: Social Media Listening
listening.description: The Social Media Listening service focuses on social platforms and online communities. It monitors major social networks (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, etc.), blogs, forums (e.g. Reddit, Quora), and review sites for conversations about your brand, competitors, products or industry. By design, listening tools monitor and analyze online conversations about your brand, capturing both direct mentions and indirect discussions (e.g. hashtags and keywords). This real-time listening detects sentiment and emerging trends among your audience. The system also identifies key influencers and gauges overall brand mood. By monitoring mentions of competitors, you can gain insights into their performance – for example, understanding their customer feedback helps you differentiate your own strategy. Alerts can be triggered on spikes in social activity or viral posts, so your team can respond immediately.

web.title: Web Monitoring
web.description: Beyond social media, our Web Monitoring service covers the broader Internet: news websites, industry blogs, discussion forums, podcasts, and video channels (e.g. YouTube). It ensures you never miss important conversations that happen outside mainstream social networks. Effective reputation monitoring involves a wide variety of channels – including news, forums, social, video, and review sites. Our platform aggregates all these sources so you have a complete picture of your brand’s online footprint.

multi_platform.title: Multi-Platform Coverage
multi_platform.description: Monitors conversations across social networks, blogs, forums and review sites in real time.

sentiment.title: Sentiment & Topic Analysis
sentiment.description: Applies sentiment analysis to determine whether mentions are positive, negative or neutral. Identifies trending themes and FAQs in user conversations.

keywords.title: Keyword & Hashtag Tracking
keywords.description: Continuously tracks relevant keywords, hashtags and phrases to capture all related discussions.

competitor.title: Competitor Insights
competitor.description: Benchmarks your social activity against rivals by tracking their brand mentions and sentiment.

intro.title: Analytics to Guide Strategy
intro.description: The Media Pulse platform delivers more than raw coverage counts – it provides analytics to guide strategy. We offer three main insight areas: Reputation, Competitive Benchmarking, and Social Analytics. Each tool converts the collected media data into actionable knowledge. Reputation analytics measure brand perception; benchmarking compares performance against rivals; social analytics optimizes content strategy. All insights are accessible via interactive dashboards with charts and graphs, so you can quickly spot trends and compare outcomes.

reputation.title: Reputation
reputation.description: Monitoring alone isn’t enough; you need to understand how the public sees you. Reputation analytics assess the tone and impact of media coverage. Modern reputation management is more important than ever, and our tools help track it systematically. We aggregate sentiment from all channels (news, social, forums, reviews) and quantify it over time. For example, we flag spikes in negative sentiment or sudden drops in share of voice. Our reputation monitoring identifies customer sentiment and trends across diverse channels, scoring your media coverage and alerting you to emerging crises.

items.title: Sentiment Trends
items.desc: Tracks positive vs. negative mentions to measure brand health.

items.title: Reputation Scorecards
items.desc: Dashboards that show your reputation score over time and by region or channel.

items.title: Issue Alerts
items.desc: Automated alerts for surges in negative coverage or damaging content.

items.title: Benchmark against Expectations
items.desc: Compare current reputation metrics with your past campaigns or industry norms.

benchmarking.title: Competitive Benchmarking
benchmarking.description: Understanding your competition is critical. Competitive Benchmarking compares your media performance to that of your top rivals. This tells you where you stand in share of voice and highlights competitor strategies. Our analytics show when a competitor is receiving unusually high media attention or positive buzz, and if their campaigns are generating more engagement. By monitoring mentions of competitors, you can gain insights into their performance and customer feedback to adjust your own strategy.

items.title: Share-of-Voice Comparison
items.desc: See what percentage of total industry/media coverage belongs to you versus each competitor.

items.title: Topic Gap Analysis
items.desc: Identify subjects or keywords where competitors are mentioned more often.

items.title: Trend Alerts
items.desc: Get notified if a competitor suddenly spikes in coverage or enters your market with a new campaign.

items.title: Best-Practice Insights
items.desc: Learn what competitor messaging or channels are resonating so you can adapt or differentiate.

social_analytics.title: Social Analytics
social_analytics.description: Social Analytics transforms social media data into strategic insights. It aggregates data from platforms like Facebook, X, Instagram and LinkedIn and measures performance. Our tools quantify engagement metrics (likes, shares, comments, impressions) and correlate them with content types and posting times. Dashboards highlight your top-performing posts and audience demographics, helping refine your content calendar and targeting to ensure campaigns are data-driven.

items.title: Content Performance
items.desc: Identify which posts, videos, or ads drive the highest engagement and conversions.

items.title: Audience Insights
items.desc: Break down who is engaging by demographics and geography to tailor your messaging.

items.title: Sentiment & Trends
items.desc: Analyze sentiment on social conversations and spot rising topics.

items.title: ROI Measurement
items.desc: Relate social metrics to website traffic, leads or sales for full marketing attribution.

dashboard_grid.reputation_desc: Automatic detection of coordinated disinformation campaigns. Our AI identifies pattern anomalies that precede "fake news" spikes, allowing for immediate neutralization.
dashboard_grid.scope_desc: Daily deep-source analysis across 40+ high-impact jurisdictions.
dashboard_grid.alerts_desc: Critical shifts in public perception trigger instant notifications to your leadership war room.
dashboard_grid.edit_keyword_hint: Double click to edit keyword across all matching articles
dashboard_grid.volume_heatmap_desc: Days of the week vs. Hour of the day (UAE Time)

CrisisManagementDetail.title: Crisis Management Plans
CrisisManagementDetail.description: In a complex intelligence and information environment, we don't just 'collect data' but 'divide it.' The AlMstkshf platform provides a sophisticated infrastructure based on artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) to extract the strategic value inherent in digital content.

intelligence_sentiment.title: Intelligence & Sentiment Analysis
intelligence_sentiment.desc: We move beyond superficial monitoring of posts to complex tone analysis. We use advanced natural language processing (NLP) to understand the cultural and linguistic context, enabling us to measure public opinion with high statistical accuracy and transform 'noise' into measurable performance indicators.

trend_anomaly.title: Trend & Anomaly Detection
trend_anomaly.desc: Our system doesn't just monitor trends; it analyzes the underlying mechanisms of trends. We identify anomalies in data flows and uncover the root causes of shifts in digital narratives, supporting evidence-based, rather than speculative, strategic decision-making.

audience_mapping.title: Audience & Network Mapping
audience_mapping.desc: Demographic analysis and influence networks. This involves deconstructing digital entities and analyzing hidden connections between accounts and influencers. The platform provides social network link analysis to identify key nodes driving public opinion, with precise definitions of target audience characteristics, professional profiles, and geographic locations.

multimedia_osint.title: Multimedia OSINT
multimedia_osint.desc: Powerful analytical capabilities extending to images and video:

items.title: Facial Recognition
items.desc: Identifying influential figures in visual content.

items.title: Object & Scene Detection
items.desc: Automatically detecting objects, logos, and scenes (such as gatherings or symbols).

items.title: Automated Transcription
items.desc: Converting audio content and speeches into searchable text for immediate analysis.

benchmarking.title: Competitive Benchmarking
benchmarking.desc: An analytical tool that places you within the context of the global market. Comparing 'Share of Voice' and analyzing the gaps between your brand's performance and competitors, while calculating the economic values of media coverage (AVE) to ensure maximum return on investment in strategic campaigns.

advanced_infrastructure.title: Advanced Intelligence Infrastructure
advanced_infrastructure.subtitle: Redefining how information is collected and analyzed on a global scale.

global_entity.title: Global Entity-Based Monitoring
global_entity.desc: A continuous (24/7) monitoring system that tracks entities, keywords, and tags across a global matrix encompassing social media platforms, digital media, forums, and extending to television, radio, and print publications. Real-time indexing ensures no time gap between events and their analysis.
global_entity.sub: Continuous, multi-channel indexing for real-time situational awareness.

transnational.title: Transnational Coverage
transnational.desc: Comprehensive coverage spanning all continents, with a particular focus on regional and local platforms in the Middle East, Europe, and North America. The platform integrates specialized Natural Language Processing (NLP) (specifically for Arabic) to ensure accurate analysis and overcome language barriers through advanced machine translation.
transnational.sub: Eliminating language barriers through region-specific NLP and global crawling.

query_eng.title: Advanced Query Engineering
query_eng.desc: An intelligence search interface that supports Boolean operators and complex filters (source, time range, geography, author, and sentiment type). This architecture allows analysts to move from general exploratory search to surgically precise targeted lookup.
query_eng.sub: Precision searching through complex metadata and Boolean-logic filters.

data_extraction.title: Seamless Data Extraction
data_extraction.desc: Eliminating the technical complexities of API key management or multiple accounts. The platform acts as a "technical intermediary" that handles linking, extraction, and bypassing access restrictions through a unified infrastructure, giving analysts structured data flow in a single environment.
data_extraction.sub: Unified, zero-friction access to hundreds of global data sources.

stealth_collection.title: Stealth & Anonymized Collection System
stealth_collection.desc: For security situations and sensitive investigations, the platform operates using advanced anonymity protocols, including proxy networks and the Tor network. This technology ensures non-attributable monitoring and activates anti-blocking mechanisms to guarantee the continuity of the investigation without alerting the targeted parties.
stealth_collection.sub: High-anonymity collection for sensitive investigations and OSINT operations.

dashboard_section.title: Operational Intelligence
dashboard_section.subtitle: Real-time monitoring and active crisis plans in your jurisdiction.

kyc.title: KYC Compliance
kyc.intro: In today's world, legal compliance is no longer an option; it's your company's first line of defense. With increasing regulatory pressure, many businesses are now required to implement Know Your Customer (KYC) systems and comply with Anti-Money Laundering (AML) requirements, most notably the GoAML lists. The Media Pulse system eliminates the need for manual review and the risk of human error. The system offers a unique solution combining intelligent automation with full human control. It automatically updates GoAML lists from official sources, ensuring your data is always up-to-date and compliant with the latest legislation.

goaml.title: Automatic GoAML List Updates
goaml.desc: Immediate and Continuous Compliance: Ensures all your records are subject to the latest blocking and monitoring lists without manual intervention, minimizing the risk of fines and penalties.

control.title: Full Human Control (Add, Edit, Delete)
control.desc: Flexibility and Control: Empowers the responsible attorney to add private records, modify risk classifications (Safe, Compliant, Under Review), or delete irrelevant records at their professional discretion.

audit.title: Digital Audit Trail
audit.desc: Transparency and Accountability: Documents every update, whether automatic or manual (with username and date), providing conclusive evidence for auditors.

features.verified_msg: You are currently verified for basic platform features.

risk.title: Advanced Risk Classification
risk.desc: Precise Risk Identification: The ability to classify entities and individuals (individual, entity, terrorist entity) based on the list source (automatic or manual) facilitates effective risk management.

kyc.cta: Don't just adapt to compliance—master it. Media Pulse transforms regulatory burdens into a seamless, automated advantage for your firm.

integration.title: Seamless API Integration
integration.subtitle: Amplify your existing systems with our intelligence engines.
integration.intro: Already have a media monitoring dashboard or ERP? You don't need to rebuild. Enhance your current infrastructure by integrating specific ALMSTKSHF capabilities directly via our robust API. Whether you need TV/Radio broadcasting data, press release monitoring, or advanced sentiment analysis, our modular approach allows you to plug in only what you lack.

modular.title: Modular Architecture
modular.desc: Select specific services—like Broadcast Monitoring or Crisis Alerts—and integrate them without disrupting your existing workflow.

realtime.title: Real-Time Synchronization
realtime.desc: Receive instant data streams via Webhooks or REST API, keeping your internal dashboards up-to-the-second.

compatibility.title: Universal Compatibility
compatibility.desc: Built on standard JSON/REST protocols, compatible with any modern tech stack (Python, Node.js, .NET, etc.).

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Almstkshf respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal and sensitive data processed through our specialized platforms, including LEXCORA, Media Pulse, and Smart Styling Assistant. This policy outlines how we handle data in compliance with UAE regulations and global standards.

collection.title: Information Collection
collection.content: We collect data necessary for our services: (1) Account Information via Clerk authentication; (2) Legal & Case Data uploaded to LEXCORA (processed securely as a Data Processor); (3) Media Search Profiles & Keywords for Media Pulse; (4) Body mapping parameters for the Smart Styling Assistant.

use.title: Use of Information
use.content: Data is used to: deliver ERP and CRM functionalities; execute AI-driven media sentiment analysis; provide personalized styling recommendations; and ensure compliance with TDRA regulations. We do not use client legal data for model training without explicit consent.

sharing.title: Data Sharing & Subprocessors
sharing.content: We utilize trusted infrastructure providers including Convex (Database) and Vercel (Hosting). Identity management is handled by Clerk. We do not sell data. Disclosure may occur only if required by UAE law or court order.

security.title: Security Measures
security.content: We implement SOC2-aligned security controls, including encryption at rest and in transit, role-based access control (RBAC) within LEXCORA, and continuous monitoring to protect sensitive government and legal data.

contact.title: Contact & DPO
contact.content: For privacy inquiries or data subject requests under UAE Data Protection Law, contact our Data Protection Office at rased@almstkshf.com or visit our Dubai/Abu Dhabi offices.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These Terms govern your access to the Almstkshf ecosystem, including LEXCORA, Media Pulse, and related AI services. By using our platforms, you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: Service Usage
acceptance.content: You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use our tools. For LEXCORA users, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of case files and client portals. For Media Pulse users, you agree to use media insights in compliance with copyright laws.

services.title: AI Disclaimer
services.content: Our services (Media Pulse, Smart Styling Assistant) utilize Generative AI. While we strive for accuracy, AI outputs should be verified by professional judgment before being used for critical legal or strategic decisions.

accounts.title: Account Security
accounts.content: Authentication is managed via Clerk. You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials. Suspicious activity must be reported immediately to our security team.

intellectual_property.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: The Almstkshf platform, algorithms, and proprietary datasets are owned by Almstkshf. Client data uploaded to LEXCORA remains the property of the client/law firm.

termination.title: Governing Law
termination.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in Abu Dhabi or Dubai.

AiInspector.title: AI Content Inspector
AiInspector.subtitle: Professional-grade forensic tool for detecting AI-generated text, images, and video. 100% local, 100% private.

text.placeholder: Paste the text you want to analyze here...
text.burstiness_desc: Sentence-length variance. Low = AI robot cadence, high = human irregularity.
text.vocabulary_richness_desc: Type-Token Ratio. Low TTR on long text = AI repetition.
text.passive_voice_desc: Percentage of sentences using passive construction. AI over-uses this.
text.contraction_rate_desc: Contractions per 100 words. Near-zero = formal AI tone.
text.list_density_desc: Fraction of sentences with list/enumeration markers.
text.avg_sentence_length_desc: Mean words per sentence. 15–28 word uniformity is an AI tell.
text.signal_ai_opener_desc: Response starts with typical LLM affirmation or greeting.
text.signal_ai_transition_desc: Formal connective words strongly correlated with LLM output.
text.signal_ai_hedge_desc: Corporate or assistant-voice vocabulary typical of AI generation.
text.signal_ai_overexplain_desc: Unnecessary clarification added as filler, a key LLM behavior.
text.signal_ai_closer_desc: Text ends with a typical LLM sign-off or offer to help.
text.signal_ai_structure_desc: Sentence follows rigid formula patterns favored by language models.
text.signal_passive_voice_desc: AI tends to over-use passive constructions to sound neutral.
text.signal_no_contractions_desc: Absence of contractions in long sentences signals non-human tone.
text.signal_list_structure_desc: Enumerated structure in prose, an AI preference for clarity-signaling.
text.signal_uniform_length_desc: Consistent 15–28 word sentences without length variation.
text.signal_run_on_desc: Long sentence with no commas or dashes — unnatural for human writers.
text.signal_human_signal_desc: Informal language, slang, or emotional cues indicating human authorship.
text.signal_callout_desc: Short imperative labels (Note:, Tip:) used as formatting devices by AI.

image.no_text_detected: No text detected in image layers.
image.signal_smooth_texture_desc: AI images lack camera sensor noise; skin in AI portraits is airbrushed-perfect.
image.signal_low_sat_desc: Human photos have chaotic, uneven colour across regions — AI flattens it.
image.signal_symmetry_desc: AI faces and compositions trend toward near-perfect symmetry — real life doesn't.
image.signal_uniform_color_desc: Real photos have varied R/G/B distribution; AI flattens it uniformly.
image.signal_uniform_lighting_desc: Real scenes have uneven light (shadows, reflections, highlights). AI lighting is studio-perfect.
image.signal_bg_separation_desc: AI aggressively isolates subjects from backgrounds with unnatural bokeh-like blur.
image.signal_blurred_edges_desc: Hair edges, fingers, background transitions — AI smears fine detail.
image.signal_ai_aspect_ratio_desc: Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion default to specific ratios.
image.signal_round_mp_desc: AI generators output exact round megapixel counts — cameras don't.
image.signal_no_exif_desc: Real camera photos embed EXIF data, making files larger relative to resolution.
image.signal_vibrant_palette_desc: AI models often default to vibrant, high-contrast 'Instagram-style' color mapping.
image.signal_uniform_focus_desc: Real lenses have focus falloff; AI often sharpens the entire frame uniformly.
image.signal_biometric_anomalies_desc: Detected impossible anatomy or structural biological errors.
image.signal_garbled_text_desc: Presence of nonsensical or distorted text patterns.
image.signal_ai_watermark_desc: Found hardcoded pixel patterns matching AI generator signatures.

video.flicker_info: Variance in frame consistency usually indicates AI generation.
video.no_high_risk_frames: No specific frames flagged as high risk.
video.video_methodology_desc: We sample frames across the duration, analyzing pixel noise and temporal consistency. AI videos often exhibit 'flicker' where textures shift unnaturally between frames.
video.report_desc: Deep scan of frame-by-frame consistency and pixel integrity.
video.temporal_inconsistency_desc: Score standard-deviation across frames. High = AI temporal instability.
video.brightness_flicker_desc: Percentage of frames with unnatural brightness jumps.
video.hair_edge_flicker_desc: Frames where border sharpness unstable while center stays fixed.
video.background_inconsistency_desc: Variance in background zone sharpness across frames.
video.deep_analysis_desc: Sampled Frame Deep Analysis (Zero-API Forensic Protocol)
video.no_text_in_frame: No text patterns detected in sampled frame.

upload.title: Drop files here or click to upload

AiInspector.footer_disclaimer: This tool uses rule-based heuristics and local pixel analysis. Results are probabilistic indicators, not definitive proof.
AiInspector.privacy_notice: ALMSTKSHF uses on-device linguistic analysis. Your text never leaves your browser, ensuring total confidentiality and compliance with secure data handling standards.
AiInspector.verification_protocol: Verified ALMSTKSHF Local Forensic Protocol v1.4
AiInspector.export_not_supported_excel: Excel export is coming soon for AI Forensics. Use PDF export in the meantime.
AiInspector.biometric_scouts_desc: Local ML analysis of anatomical consistency (hands, eyes, facial landmarks).
AiInspector.ocr_detect_desc: Detecting garbled or synthetic text patterns within image layers.
AiInspector.text_validation_error: Please provide at least 50 characters for an accurate forensic analysis.
